name: Seafood Sauce for Pasta (Salsa Fra Diavolo)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Plum or Roma Tomatoes; skinned, seeded, coarsely chopped with juice
8 oz Small Raw Shrimp; peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook until it starts to sizzle.
2. Pour in the tomatoes, salt, and crushed red pepper. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer the sauce for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. In another skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil over high heat. Add the shrimp and scallops.
5. Cook until the shrimp turn pink, about 2 minutes, stirring frequently. Add to the tomato mixture.
6. Stir in the parsley. Cook for an additional 3 to 4 minutes, or until the sauce just begins to bubble. Taste for salt.
7. Serve over the cooked linguine.
